final_prompt.prompt:
Create a promotional marketing poster for a 跨境电商 campaign.

Style/medium: needs a complex-yet-structured commercial poster aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal layout; must include layered typography stacking with artistic lettering; must include a product or hero subject physically overlapping and partially obscuring some of the type layers
Subject: must include a hero product or brand subject as the focal element that overlaps the text
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy promotional atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, eye-catching direction suited to 跨境电商 promotions — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all four compositional rules: (1) artistic lettering present, (2) typography stacking / layering present, (3) visually rich but not chaotic, (4) product/subject overlaps and occludes portions of the type
Avoid: must avoid cluttered or disorganized layouts despite visual complexity
